Section:
Creating Hyperplane Arrangements
This section describes functions for constructing hyperplane arrangements.
In the HypArr package, an arrangement is defined by a list of vectors representing linear forms.
Each vector
(r_1,\dots,r_n)
represents the hyperplane
r_1 x_1 + \cdots + r_n x_n = 0.

Constructor from Defining Linear Forms
<#Include Label="HyperplaneArrangement">

Arrangements from Reflection Groups
The package provides constructors for certain important families of hyperplane arrangements arising from complex reflection groups.
<#Include Label="AGpql">
